evidence: "This is one of the best dramas on TV."
"The story lines for this show just keep getting juicier."
"It felt natural... like it was always going to end this way."
"You can tell the producers spent a lot of money on the production of this film but the storyline and premise is insulting to my intelligence."
"I wish they wouldn't have shown her breast cancer scars. It's a little too much for me!"
"I have watched a lot of Spike Lee films in the past and loved them."
"I enjoyed getting the backstory on Beth and the shooting."
"It goes way beyond stealing, it explores the psyche of the teens."
"I felt emotionally attached to the younger characters."
"This is one of my favorite series I ever watched!"

summary: The user has a strong preference for fast-paced dramas and documentaries, often binge-watching series. They appreciate emotional depth and character development, particularly in works by Spike Lee, while showing less concern for production quality.
